chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-145 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 19.02.2026 Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Bashir Ahmed DSP/SDPO Qasimabad, Inspector Muhammad Juman Khoso SHO Qasimabad, Muhammad Ilyas Qureshi PDSP on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, Inspector Abdul Malik Abro SHO N/Nagar and SIP Faheem Hussain DIGP Office Hyderabad. Comments filed on behalf of respondents No.4, 5, 6 & 7 are taken on record. This petition is filed by the petitioner Ghulam Akbar Korejo for the alleged missing of his son namely Zeeshan Korejo suspecting that the private respondents No.8, 9, 10 and 11 are actively involved in the matter. However, from the perusal of the comments filed by the police authorities, it transpires that in compliance with the directions of this Court, a special team was constituted by the SSP Hyderabad to trace the alleged missing person, Zeeshan Korejo. During inquiry, it surfaced that FIR No.28/2026 was registered at Police Station Qasimabad under Sections 365-B, 506/2, 504 and 34 PPC, wherein the alleged detainee himself has been nominated as an accused along with other co-accused in a case of kidnapping of one Mst.Sania. Consequently, C.P. No.S-78/2026 has been filed by respondent No.8 before this Court, which is still pending adjudication. The investigation is stated to be in progress; some co-accused have obtained pre-arrest bail from this Court at Karachi, while one accused has been arrested. Per comments, Zeeshan Korejo is not missing but is absconding to evade arrest and that efforts are underway, including operations beyond the province to apprehend him and recover the abductee.

The investigation is stated to be in progress; some co-accused have obtained pre-arrest bail from this Court at Karachi, while one accused has been arrested. Per comments, Zeeshan Korejo is not missing but is absconding to evade arrest and that efforts are underway, including operations beyond the province to apprehend him and recover the abductee. The petitioner has impleaded respondent No.8, namely Aziz Lashari, Advocate, who is the complainant of the aforesaid FIR, whereas respondents No.9 to 11 are close family members of the alleged abductee Mst. Sania in FIR No.28/2026 of PS Qasimabad. In the peculiar facts and circumstances of the case, the possibility of a counter-narrative being set up regarding the alleged disappearance of Zeeshan Korejo, aged about 18/19 years, cannot be ruled out. Prima facie, it appears that the instant petition has been instituted to exert pressure upon the complainant of said FIR as well as upon the police authorities who are presently engaged in investigation and recovery proceedings of the alleged abductee Mst. Sania. In view of the above position, the SSP Hyderabad is directed to conduct a transparent and independent inquiry in the matter, make all possible efforts for the arrest/recovery of Zeeshan Korejo in accordance with law and submit a comprehensive report before this Court through Additional Registrar of this Court. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
